members.name: AbortOnReset
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the sub-animation will abort if resumed with a reset after a prior interruption.

members.name: Autorestart
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the sub-animation will restart automatically after finishing. In other words, to start auto restarting, the animation must be played once with the [constant ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_FIRE] request. The [constant ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_ABORT] request stops the auto restarting, but it does not disable the [member autorestart] itself. So, the [constant ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_FIRE] request will start auto restarting again.

members.name: AutorestartDelay
members.summary: The delay after which the automatic restart is triggered, in seconds.

members.name: AutorestartRandomDelay
members.summary: If [member autorestart] is [code]true[/code], a random additional delay (in seconds) between 0 and this value will be added to [member autorestart_delay].

members.name: BreakLoopAtEnd
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], breaks the loop at the end of the loop cycle for transition, even if the animation is looping.

members.name: FadeinCurve
members.summary: Determines how cross-fading between animations is eased. If empty, the transition will be linear. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: FadeinTime
members.summary: The fade-in duration. For example, setting this to [code]1.0[/code] for a 5 second length animation will produce a cross-fade that starts at 0 second and ends at 1 second during the animation. [b]Note:[/b] [AnimationNodeOneShot] transitions the current state after the fading has finished.

members.name: FadeoutCurve
members.summary: Determines how cross-fading between animations is eased. If empty, the transition will be linear. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: FadeoutTime
members.summary: The fade-out duration. For example, setting this to [code]1.0[/code] for a 5 second length animation will produce a cross-fade that starts at 4 second and ends at 5 second during the animation. [b]Note:[/b] [AnimationNodeOneShot] transitions the current state after the fading has finished.

values.name: MIX_MODE_ADD
values.summary: Blends two animations additively. See also [AnimationNodeAdd2].

values.name: ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_ABORT
values.summary: The request to stop the animation connected to "shot" port.

values.name: ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_FADE_OUT
values.summary: The request to fade out the animation connected to "shot" port.

values.name: ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_FIRE
values.summary: The request to play the animation connected to "shot" port.

values.name: ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_NONE
values.summary: The default state of the request. Nothing is done.

constants.name: ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_NONE
constants.summary: The default state of the request. Nothing is done.

constants.name: ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_FIRE
constants.summary: The request to play the animation connected to "shot" port.

constants.name: ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_ABORT
constants.summary: The request to stop the animation connected to "shot" port.

constants.name: ONE_SHOT_REQUEST_FADE_OUT
constants.summary: The request to fade out the animation connected to "shot" port.

constants.name: MIX_MODE_ADD
constants.summary: Blends two animations additively. See also [AnimationNodeAdd2].
